title: Kahit maputi na ang buhok ko
original_title: Kahit Maputi na ang Buhok Ko
overview: Rey Valera relives the inspirations - people, situations, communities, and times - that spurred him to compose some of his most popular and deeply meaningful Original Pilipino Music hits across the decades of his iconic career.
